$comment: irrevonbench/environment/v1 (preregistration §8 environment manifest) — proposed by ADR-0030. Captured once per run; the run manifest pins its digest. Environment drift between paired runs is a reportable integrity signal. Container pinning (base + digest) is a Stage-B mechanism choice (§0 checklist); the fields exist now so the capture code is exercised before it matters. $id host is a placeholder (ADR-0023). Shape changes require an ADR.
title: IrrevonBench environment manifest

packages.description: Installed distributions relevant to the harness (name, version), sorted by name.

lockfile_sha256.description: sha256 of uv.lock when resolvable from the repository; null in installed-package contexts.

container.description: Pinned container identity when running containerized (Stage-B mechanism); null on bare metal.

test_hooks_armed.description: Must be false: IRREVON_TEST_HOOKS with IRREVON_BENCH is a startup error (testhooks arming rule); recorded so the invariant is auditable per run.
